name: Fresh Asparagus Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard tough ends and trim scales from asparagus; reserve a few whole asparagus spears for garnish.
2. Cut the remaining asparagus into bite-sized pieces. Cut carrots diagonally into thin slices.
3. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, add hot salad oil. Cook asparagus and carrots until tender-crisp, stirring occasionally.
4. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, beat eggs, shredded Mozzarella cheese, and dried thyme with a fork or wire whisk.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the skillet with vegetables, tilting to coat the bottom of the skillet evenly with the egg mixture and blend with the vegetables.
6. Arrange the whole asparagus spears on top of the egg mixture to form a pretty design.
7. Over medium heat, cook for 5 to 7 minutes until eggs are set, occasionally tilting the skillet and lifting the edge of the cooked egg mixture to let the uncooked portion run into the skillet.
8. To serve, cut the frittata into wedges. Serve immediately. Makes 4 main dish servings.
